programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.title: Live: 2026 Wimbledon Championships
programme.desc: From the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club in Wimbledon, England.

programme.title: Live: Breakfast at Wimbledon
programme.desc: Breakfast at Wimbledon gets the viewer ready for that day's action with previews, discussion and behind-the-scenes features at the All England Club.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Wimbledon Championships
programme.desc: From the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club in Wimbledon, England.

programme.title: NWSL: The Final Third
programme.desc: All roads lead to the NWSL championship as the Washington Spirit and Gotham FC deliver an epic finale. Spirit midfielder Hal Hershfelt reflects on her journey. Kansas City looks to the future after a heartbreaking loss. Angel City's Tiernan heads to the NWSL Awards as a Rookie of the Year finalist.

programme.title: Live: NWSL Soccer
programme.desc: Seattle Reign FC hosts Portland Thorns FC in a regular-season NWSL soccer game at Lumen Field. The visiting Thorns rely on forward Sophia Smith to lead the attack, while the home Reign count on forward Mia Fishel to drive the offense.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Countdown
programme.desc: WNBA news, analysis, highlights and interviews.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: From American Airlines Center in Dallas.

programme.title: Live: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Coverage of the first ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana. The hosts are looking for their first series victory in this format since 2012, with the Kiwi's dominating them in one-day internationals since then. In the eight series between these two sides since the turn of the century, the West Indies have only won two, while New Zealand h

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: Another chance to watch the epic 1994 UEFA Champions League final between AC Milan and Barcelona in Greece, as Fabio Capello's men gave a masterclass against Johan Cruyff's side.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: We look back at the eventful 2017/18 UEFA Champions League final between five-time winners Liverpool and Real Madrid, who were hoping to lift their third consecutive title in Kiev.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 4 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: Live: V8 Supercars Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of the 22nd race of the campaign, which comes from Townsville.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: A look at the early stages of the Tour de France.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Action from the 13th day of the tournament.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: It's A Numbers Game
programme.desc: The key numbers behind Valentino Rossi and Marc Marquez in MotoGP, Jonathan Rea's record-setting Superbike dominance, the rapid Thruxton circuit, and more.

programme.title: World Superbikes
programme.desc: Action from the first Superbike race at Donington Park Circuit in Leicestershire.

programme.title: Live: World Superbikes
programme.desc: Coverage of the Superbike Superpole race at Donington Park Circuit in Leicestershire, England, where the eighth round of the season takes place.

programme.title: British Superbikes Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the second round of the season at Donington Park.

programme.title: British Superbikes Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the third round of the season at Knockhill Racing Circuit.

programme.title: British Superbikes Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the fourth round of the season at Snetterton Circuit.

programme.title: Superbike Rewind
programme.desc: Action from the seventh round of the Superbike World Championship in the United Kingdom.

programme.desc: Coverage of the second race at Donington Park Circuit, where the fifth round of the season takes place.

programme.title: Live: World Superbikes
programme.desc: Coverage of the second Supersport race at Donington Park Circuit in Leicestershire, England, where the eighth round of the season takes place.

programme.desc: Coverage from the 6 Hours of Sao Paulo, as the fourth round of the season takes place at Autodromo Jose Carlos Pace in Sao Paulo.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: St Louis Cardinals v Atlanta Braves (Start-time 12.15am). Coverage of the National League match from Busch Stadium. These two teams last met at this venue in July last year in a three-match series that was won 2-1 by the Braves. The visitors won the first two games 6-5 and 7-6 in tight matches before the Cardinals picked up a 5-4 consolation victory.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from MotoGP Grand Prix of Germany.

programme.title: World Superbikes
programme.desc: Action from the first Superbike race at Donington Park Circuit in Leicestershire.

programme.desc: Action from the eighth stage of the race.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Angling magazine show presented by Rob Hughes and Andy Ford, featuring coverage of the 2026 Sea Angling Classic.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the extraordinary 2004/05 UEFA Champions League group stage tie between Liverpool and Olympiakos at Anfield. Rafael Benitez's men needed to win by two goals to progress.

programme.title: Live: Moto4 Northern Cup
programme.desc: Coverage of race two from the fifth round of the season, which takes place in Germany.

programme.desc: The Grand Prix of Germany warm-up sessions. Coverage of preparations for the 11th round of the season at Sachsenring.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Live: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Coverage of the men's singles final, which takes place at the All England Club, as the winner of the third Grand Slam title of the year is decided. This is the first such final since 2022 that won't involve Carlos Alcaraz, who missed the tournament through injury, leaving world number one Jannik Sinner as favourite to build on his triumph of last year. Sinner became the first Italian to win the me

programme.desc: Action from the men's elite cross country olympic race in Pal Arinsal, Andorra.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 16 Commodores (7-2, 3-2 SEC) try to bounce back as they host the Tigers (4-5, 1-5). Vanderbilt comes off a 34-31 loss at then-No. 20 Texas. Auburn severed ties with head coach Hugh Freeze on Nov. 2, one day after a 10-3 home loss to Kentucky.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: An exploration of the class and power dynamics in college sports through the interconnected journeys of one-time dynamic running back Maurice Clarett and former elite head coach Jim Tressel.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Live: Cornhole
programme.desc: Pro Teams, Week 4 Final.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 14 Commodores (8-2, 4-2 SEC) attempt to equal a school record as they host the Wildcats (5-5, 2-5). Vanderbilt's most victories in a season is nine, accomplished in 2013, 2012, 1915 and 1904. The Commodores won two of the last three meetings.

programme.title: NFL Football
programme.desc: Football action from around the National Football League.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 14 Commodores face the No. 23 Hawkeyes in the ReliaQuest Bowl. Vanderbilt reached 10 wins for the first time in program history following a statement 45-24 win over rival Tennessee on Nov. 29. Iowa is 3-3 all-time in this bowl game.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 17 Bearcats (7-1, 5-0 Big 12) and No. 24 Utes (6-2, 3-2) meet for the first time. Cincinnati has won seven straight since dropping its season opener 20-17 to Nebraska. Utah returned to the AP Top 25 following a 53-7 victory over Colorado.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Bears try to get their first win against the Big 12 rival No. 13 Utes. Utah is 2-0 all-time playing Baylor. Bears quarterback Sawyer Robertson entered Week 12 tied for the national lead with 26 TD throws, while ranking fifth 2,780 passing yards.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 12 Utes (8-2, 5-2 Big 12) face the Wildcats (5-5, 4-3) for the first time. Utah looks to solidify its CFP case after topping 40 points in winning five of its last six. Kansas State tries to clinch its 14th bowl game since the 2010 campaign.

programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.desc: Action from the ninth stage of the race.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: San Diego Padres v Toronto Blue Jays (Start-time 9.10pm). Coverage of the inter-league match from Petco Park, as the teams play the third and final game of the series. The two sides last met in a three-match series in Toronto back in May last year, as the Blue Jays claimed a 3-0 victory. Toronto dominated the first two games thanks to 3-0 and 14-0 wins before they won a tight affair 7-6 to sweep t

programme.title: MLB Classic
programme.desc: MLB Classic takes a look at one of the epic moments from the game's history and the 1993 National League West.

programme.title: MLB Classic
programme.desc: PRIME 9, the acclaimed Major League Baseball series, counts down the nine greatest animal nicknames of all-time.

programme.title: MLB Classic
programme.desc: A look at some of the most famous bloopers.

programme.desc: Day three of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky.

programme.desc: The Seattle Orcas play the San Francisco Unicorns in a Major League Cricket clash.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live Evian Championship Golf R4
programme.desc: The final day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago.

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The fourth and final round of the Genesis Scottish Open - a DP World Tour Rolex Series event - at the Renaissance Club.

programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: An iconic club in Germany and across Europe, Bayern Munich's an institution for many. Kylian Mbappé has fast made the World Cup his own, while Aitana Bonmatí broke new ground for Women's football in 2023.

programme.title: Black College Quiz
programme.desc: The Black College Quiz series is designed to encourage an appreciation of African-American Heritage and feature college students from Historically Black Institutions; Morehouse College, Spelman College, Chicago State University.

programme.desc: Four teams compete in Elimination Match 3 of the Challenge Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Port Huron, Mich.

programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.desc: From explosive knockouts and technical battles to the electrifying atmosphere that has made Muay Thai one of the fastest-growing combat sports in the world, every bout delivers the excitement of world-class kickboxing.

programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Behind the A
programme.desc: Following Colorado Avalanche Director of Amateur Scouting Nick Pryor as he hunts for the next generation of talent.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.desc: Nick Luck has the best interviews from expert guests in our unmissable weekly show.

programme.desc: Rishi Persad and Steve Mellish reflect with Johnny Murtagh on his remarkable career; looking back at the triumphs, challenges and defining moments that made him one of racing's most celebrated jockeys.

programme.title: Sportsnet Central

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The San Diego Padres host the Toronto Blue Jays at Petco Park in Game 3 of a three-game series. Kevin Gausman is the starting pitcher for the Blue Jays, while German Marquez takes the mound for the Padres in an interleague regular-season showdown.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The San Diego Padres host the Toronto Blue Jays at Petco Park in Game 3 of a three-game series. Kevin Gausman is the starting pitcher for the Blue Jays, while German Marquez takes the mound for the Padres in an interleague regular-season showdown.

programme.title: The Blue Jays Way
programme.desc: A young expansion team grows from snowy underdogs to contenders as Dave Stieb defines the Blue Jays origin story.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Red Sox take on the Mets as they continue their three-game series at Citi Field. Right-handed Freddy Peralta is the expected starter for the Mets. Slugger Willson Contreras leads the Red Sox in home runs, batting average and RBIs.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at the obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York Sports from 2006.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Red Sox take on the Mets as they continue their three-game series at Citi Field. Right-handed Freddy Peralta is the expected starter for the Mets. Slugger Willson Contreras leads the Red Sox in home runs, batting average and RBIs.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Ideal Prostate+ Provides Safe Natural Relief
programme.desc: Ideal Prostate is the only Prostate Formula with a patented blend to relieve both PROSTATE & BLADDER Symptoms. Tune in for a Special TV offer!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York sports from 1991.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 1992.

programme.title: Broadway Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action featuring up-and-coming fighters and promising contenders.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure, oddball, and twisted stories from 1993.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Canyon of Heroes
programme.desc: An original SNY documentary that looks into the unique history of New York City's ticker-tape parades as they celebrated along Broadway, focusing on the major championship celebrations in 1994 and 1986.

programme.title: Mets Yearbook
programme.desc: Highlights of the New York Mets season.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Oh Yeah... is a gold mine of obscure, oddball, and twisted stories spanning 40 years in New York Sports and nothing is off limits. With interviews involving celebrity and sports personalities, SNY takes a look back.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure, oddball, and twisted stories from 1976.

programme.title: Collegiate Summer Baseball
programme.desc: From Arnie Allen Diamond at Guv Fuller Field in Falmouth, Mass.

programme.desc: A weekly, behind the scenes look at the highs, lows and realities of racing in the Ducati Lenovo team!

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: Live: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From BrewDog Stadium in St. Helens, England.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From Accor Stadium in Sydney.

programme.title: UCI ProSeries Cycling
programme.desc: Coverage of the second tier men's elite road cycling tour.

programme.title: MotoGP Racing
programme.desc: From Sachsenring in Hohenstein-Ernstthal, Sachsen, Germany.

programme.title: NRL Women's Premiership
programme.desc: Coverage of matches played in the Australian Women's National Rugby League.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From March 11, 2001.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: Another vintage batch of footage from the FA Cup.

programme.title: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From BrewDog Stadium in St. Helens, England.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve ventures to his hunting and fishing shack in Southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: During the cold closing days of elk season, Steve ascends thousands of feet into the Bitterroot Mountains of Western Montana seeking a legal bull.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: On horseback, Steve stalks mule deer with Janis Putelis and Adam Weatherby in the Wyoming back country; snowfall complicates the hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Still looking for game in Wyoming, Janis Putelis resorts to a mule deer drive; the trio uses an oven rack to help prepare venison ribs.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Modern day mountain man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Deep in the cornfields of Nebraska, Scott joins in on a family tradition going back generations: turtle hunting. With claws that shred, and an unrelenting bite, Snapping Turtles are not to be taken lightly.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: Hosted by international big game hunter Dave Fulson, Trijicon's World Of Sports Afield takes the viewer around the globe in search of big game adventure; from the rugged Yukon, to the windswept mountains of North America and Asia, to the great game fields of Africa, this series delivers world-class hunting in each episode!

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: Hornady's Dark & Dangerous is a bold series that documents the highs, lows, harsh realities and tangible risks always present on a fair chase, dangerous game safari into wild Africa. This features Africa's most recognized Professional Hunters who allow the Safari Classics camera crew unprecedented access into the world of real time safari adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts turkeys at Yturria Ranch with Luke Combs.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Join youth hunter Chase Anthony on an exhilarating journey in Chasing the 29. Follow Chase as he pursues the prestigious North American 29, a monumental challenge to hunt 29 big game species across the continent. Also featured on this show are adventures from his Dangerous 7, a daring quest to hunt seven of Africa's most formidable animals. Packed with heart-pounding moments and stunning landscape

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Modern day mountain man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel-it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles, and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: Micro compact pistols are easy to carry, but they can be more difficult to shoot well.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Part 2 of a nighttime patrol to stop anglers from keeping fish that are foul-hooked.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Join youth hunter Chase Anthony on an exhilarating journey in Chasing the 29. Follow Chase as he pursues the prestigious North American 29, a monumental challenge to hunt 29 big game species across the continent. Also featured on this show are adventures from his Dangerous 7, a daring quest to hunt seven of Africa's most formidable animals. Packed with heart-pounding moments and stunning landscape

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the gray light; these moments are what make up the beauty of the wi

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A hunting show for EVERYONE! Come enjoy our fast-paced and upbeat hunting show. Follow along with hosts Brandon Jennings, Sean Lundy, and John O'Dell as we travel all over the globe hunting multiple species, attempt to educate and entertain our viewers, and focus on the one thing that matters most.... Family.

programme.title: WildFed
programme.desc: Daniel goes turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leeks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather harvests a seal during the herring spawn to make seal oil and to share traditional foods with her community.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetai

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Whitetail Properties takes you on exciting hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane searches his tackle box to select the appropriate bait for bass fishing.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: There's buried treasure along the Washington coastline and fishmonger Tommy Gomes is on the hunt.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Florida's Space Coast is a great place to catch snook and Captain Peter Deeks knows just where to find them.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike And Geoff put an absolute clinic in Sarasota Florida.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Andrew Upshaw takes on offshore saltwater fishing in Gulf Shores, Alabama, continuing the #4 series with commercial Shark Fishing.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane searches his tackle box to select the appropriate bait for bass fishing.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Join youth hunter Chase Anthony on an exhilarating journey in Chasing the 29. Follow Chase as he pursues the prestigious North American 29, a monumental challenge to hunt 29 big game species across the continent. Also featured on this show are adventures from his Dangerous 7, a daring quest to hunt seven of Africa's most formidable animals. Packed with heart-pounding moments and stunning landscape

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Kali Parmley heads into the Colorado alpine in search of dusky grouse.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel-it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles, and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather harvests a seal during the herring spawn to make seal oil and to share traditional foods with her community.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetai

programme.title: WildFed
programme.desc: Daniel goes turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leeks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Modern day mountain man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: Beautiful, cool, coastal California is the setting for this cattle ranch focused on regenerative farming.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Tyler Weaver & Kenneth Lancaster return to the Brooks Range of Alaska, on a DIY caribou hunt.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: The team is back in the Yukon getting camp set up. Included is the challenging task of transporting the ARGO UTVs from one place to another.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: There's buried treasure along the Washington coastline and fishmonger Tommy Gomes is on the hunt.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane searches his tackle box to select the appropriate bait for bass fishing.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: A Colorado Elk hunt from a fresh perspective as Kyle Wieter helps guide his close friend and first time hunter Brad Pfitzner to success.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Part 2 of a nighttime patrol to stop anglers from keeping fish that are foul-hooked.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Cobb and the infamous hartebeest.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Nick visits Key Largo with Capt. Bruce Davis to search out backwater battles with snook, redfish, trout and other surprises in Florida Bay.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Capt. George Gozdz packs up for a week of exploration into Bahamian waters.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - 2025 Redcrest Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour from Lake Guntersville in Birmingham, AL.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Ott DeFoe fights his way through some of the biggest bass of the series.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam matches the hatch on the perch migration for big bites.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Bays on the Great Lakes are magical places for smallmouth and Esrevart is no exception; Z travels north and lands on them.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Spencer Shuffield and Todd Goade fight for the Ultimate Match Fishing title on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - 2025 Redcrest Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour from Lake Guntersville in Birmingham, AL.

programme.desc: Kevin VanDam matches the hatch on the perch migration for big bites.

programme.desc: Bays on the Great Lakes are magical places for smallmouth and Esrevart is no exception; Z travels north and lands on them.

programme.desc: Spencer Shuffield and Todd Goade fight for the Ultimate Match Fishing title on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.desc: Bays on the Great Lakes are magical places for smallmouth and Esrevart is no exception; Z travels north and lands on them.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - 2025 Redcrest Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour from Lake Guntersville in Birmingham, AL.

programme.desc: Kevin VanDam matches the hatch on the perch migration for big bites.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Bays on the Great Lakes are magical places for smallmouth and Esrevart is no exception; Z travels north and lands on them.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Spencer Shuffield and Todd Goade fight for the Ultimate Match Fishing title on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - 2025 Redcrest Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour from Lake Guntersville in Birmingham, AL.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Ott DeFoe fights his way through some of the biggest bass of the series.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam matches the hatch on the perch migration for big bites.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - 2025 Redcrest Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour from Lake Guntersville in Birmingham, AL.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Ott DeFoe fights his way through some of the biggest bass of the series.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam matches the hatch on the perch migration for big bites.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: It's not every day that we get to fish below Victoria Falls, one of the great natural wonders of our world. Nor is it that you get to do so in the company of a former Springbok Captain and Rugby legend. Not that it took much convincing to entice Bob.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The warm currents of the Indian Ocean provide a bounty of species for anglers to target. Join Tommo and Wes as they cruise around the islands off Vilanculos hunting for the resident fish for which these reefs are renowned.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: South Africa's largest port city, Durban, forms a perfect melting pot of deep calm waters and warm currents, which in turn brings in the big game fish; it's time to see what Durban has to offer!

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: Tommo fishes the lower Zambezi River, staying on a live aboard boat and fishing with Cuan Meredith, the owner of River Gods Adventures. They fish with baits, targeting a variety of species of fish, some of which are endemic to the lower Zambezi.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: We paddle down the largest waterway in South Africa, the great Orange river. Carving a path through Namibia, we endure the Kalahari Desert to challenge the yellow fish that grows to trophy proportions in this wild environment.
